creator: exploringlondon
caption:
No more gatekeeping, if you need the toilet whilst on the London Underground, these are the best toilets on the network 🤣 Newly refurbished as part of the @citywestminster £12.7million West End refurbishment programme, and beautiful too, with artwork by London artist James Lambert.

The bold tiled artwork is inspired by Anteros, with winged figures and vibrant pink and yellow tones celebrating the energy, theatre and iconic lights of Piccadilly Circus 💡

📍 Piccadilly Circus Station, near Exit 1 ❤️
💷 £1 to enter

transcription.text: I adore you, I adore you, can't ignore you, can't ignore you I'm out of control, I can't, I adore you, I adore you
